title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Reliance Industries

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Reliance Industries
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!
